_readme: Type B / context-decision SINGLE SOURCE registry. ONE list of factors, each tagged with `tier` (1 mesure / 2 estimation / 3 concurrence / 4 action) + per-tier `source`. Consumers FILTER by tier: the engine fit list (src/scripts/sensitivity-engine.cjs) and the design-matrix build (src/scripts/build-designmatrix.cjs) take ONLY `fittable:true` entries (Tier-1 environment factors) — so estimation/concurrence/action factors live in the same list but are STRUCTURALLY EXCLUDED from the regression (competitor text/priors never reach the fit). The endpoint (src/pages/api/insight/reactions-today.ts) reads: Tier 1 = `fittable` predicates active today × the learned store; Tier 2 = `impact_col` (delta_att_*) non-zero today, SUPPRESSED per venue×factor when Tier 1 measures the same factor; Tier 3 = the `concurrence` descriptor's marts (top-3 proximity-aware); Tier 4 = the `action` descriptor (labelled-absent until the origin_factor bridge). `predicate` = SQL bool over `context_table` (Tier-1 activation + matrix column). `impact_col` = a delta_att_* column in fct_location_opportunity_components_daily (Tier-2 estimate, expert prior — NEVER labelled mesure). `label_key` keys the owner-final French copy; this file authors NO words. See docs/features/context-decision-service.md.

revenue.note: active; ~98 on-days. No delta_att_* prior column -> Tier-1 only
measured where contrast (Occitanie); estimated prior everywhere
Tier-1 fit; Tier-2 prior is the combined `calendar` component (see below), not per-holiday
0 contrast in summer -> deferred by the variance gate (fit); estimated prior still shows if active
PLACEHOLDER (inert 0). Its Tier-2 estimated prior is the `events` component below; its honest fit form is continuous event_count_region (A3)
Tier-2 ONLY (estimated prior). Distinct from the inert Tier-1 major_event placeholder; never fitted
Tier-2 ONLY (estimated prior). Combined school+public holiday / audience-availability; never fitted
Tier-3 descriptor: followed competitors (top-3 proximity-aware), local density, named nearby events. Observed facts, NO impact number, never in the regression
Tier-4 descriptor: Engine-1 measured track record, factor-keyed via origin_factor. Labelled-absent until the bridge lands
